title: desmanthus latus
intro: Desmanthus latus, also known as Japanese sweet alyssum or sweet alyssum, is an annual or perennial herb in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its delicate, white flowers and sweet fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desmanthus latus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce stress and anxiety. Desmanthus latus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
